name: Integration - End-to-End Ticket Verification Failure
description: Validates the workflow for an invalid or already used ticket via the /api/assistant/verify_ticket endpoint, ensuring proper error handling and audit logging.
input: POST to /api/assistant/verify_ticket with an invalid or used ticket_code and valid event_id.
output: JSON response indicating success, authorized: false, and a formatted failure message.
success_criteria: Audit log event is recorded with action 'validation_failure'
